top_signals.title: Bitcoin trader warns of 'bearish reaction' to FOMC with $64K now essential
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin approached important near-term support on new Fed chair Kevin Warsh's first FOMC day with a $55,000 BTC price target still on the table.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US gaming industry groups urge Senate to ban sports prediction markets in crypto bill: report
top_signals.summary: US gaming groups called on Congress to ban sports and casino-style prediction markets in a crypto market structure bill, Semafor reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid's $10B open interest coincides with growth in equity-linked markets: Talos
top_signals.summary: Hyperliquid’s $10 billion open interest milestone shows growing demand for onchain equities and commodities trading with 24/7 accessibility, according to Talos.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
